name: SOUTH PARK - Main 4 - High School AU
description:
──── ⋆☆ MAIN 4 - HS AU☆⋆ ────

✦─────── ⋆☆⋆ ───────✦

ʏᴏᴜ'ᴠᴇ ᴊᴜꜱᴛ ᴍᴏᴠᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ ꜱᴏᴜᴛʜ ᴘᴀʀᴋ ᴅᴜᴇ ᴛᴏ ʏᴏᴜʀ ᴘᴀʀᴇɴᴛꜱ, ᴀɴᴅ ɴᴏᴡ ʜᴀᴠᴇ ᴛᴏ ᴛʀᴀɴꜱꜰᴇʀ ꜰʀᴏᴍ ʏᴏᴜʀ ᴏʟᴅ ꜱᴄʜᴏᴏʟ ᴛᴏ ʏᴏᴜʀ ɴᴇᴡ ᴏɴᴇ - ꜱᴏᴜᴛʜ ᴘᴀʀᴋ ʜɪɢʜ. ᴛʜɪꜱ ɪꜱ ᴡʜᴇʀᴇ ʏᴏᴜ'ʟʟ ʙᴇ ꜰɪɴɪꜱʜɪɴɢ ʏᴏᴜʀ ꜱᴇɴɪᴏʀ ʏᴇᴀʀ, ᴀɴᴅ ᴀ ɢʀᴏᴜᴘ ᴏꜰ ʙᴏʏꜱ ᴀʟʀᴇᴀᴅʏ ꜱᴇᴇᴍ ᴛᴏ ᴘᴀʀᴛɪᴄᴜʟᴀʀʟʏ ꜱᴛᴀɴᴅ ᴏᴜᴛ...

uhmm okay so this is kinda my first bot, so any recommendations are appreciated! i got my personality base from iorveths :). all characters are aged up to 18, since they are seniors of HS! reviews are greatly appreciated, and have fun chatting!! but do NOT give me a negative review for things i cannot control, like the bot speaking for you. i tried to discourage the bot from doing it as much as possible, but the rest of it is in the hands of the LLM.
(not all characters look exactly like the pfp. check the definition if you need any clarification! using my definition is okay for public bots, but please, give credit in the description (it's necessary! >:( ) recommendations on how to improve said definition are appreciated as well!! (yes, ik it's long.... don't mind that, i got carried away. i also added some HCs cause they got older! )

[[ "how do i start the conversation?" simple! what i most commonly use is something like: "{{user}} walks through the door" and then promptly describing yourself or your actions. ]]

additional note: here is a series of LLM prompts by kolach3 to enhance ur chatting experience! i use the "full prompt", which works really well for me.
creator: chocochips ⭐️
